2026-02-15.text: Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding; in all your ways submit to him, and he will make your paths straight.

2026-02-16.text: The Lord is my shepherd, I lack nothing. He makes me lie down in green pastures, he leads me beside quiet waters, he refreshes my soul.

2026-02-17.text: I can do all this through him who gives me strength.

2026-02-18.text: For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.

2026-02-19.text: Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged, for the Lord your God will be with you wherever you go.

2026-02-20.text: And we know that in all things God works for the good of those who love him, who have been called according to his purpose.

2026-02-21.text: The Lord is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.

2026-02-22.text: But those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength. They will soar on wings like eagles; they will run and not grow weary, they will walk and not be faint.

2026-02-23.text: Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God.

2026-02-24.text: Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.

2026-02-25.text: The Lord is my light and my salvation — whom shall I fear? The Lord is the stronghold of my life — of whom shall I be afraid?

2026-02-26.text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.

2026-02-27.text: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you. I do not give to you as the world gives. Do not let your hearts be troubled and do not be afraid.

2026-02-28.text: Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart.

2026-03-01.text: Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.

2026-03-02.text: The name of the Lord is a fortified tower; the righteous run to it and are safe.

2026-03-03.text: Have I not commanded you? Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged, for the Lord your God will be with you wherever you go.

2026-03-04.text: The Lord bless you and keep you; the Lord make his face shine on you and be gracious to you.

2026-03-05.text: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, forbearance, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness and self-control.

2026-03-06.text: He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds.

2026-03-07.text: And my God will meet all your needs according to the riches of his glory in Christ Jesus.

2026-03-08.text: The Lord is good, a refuge in times of trouble. He cares for those who trust in him.

translations.ESV: The Lord is good, a stronghold in the day of trouble; he knows those who take refuge in him.
translations.NIV: The Lord is good, a refuge in times of trouble. He cares for those who trust in him.
translations.NLT: The LORD is good, a strong refuge when trouble comes. He is close to those who trust in him.
translations.WEB: Yahweh is good, a stronghold in the day of trouble; and he knows those who take refuge in him.
translations.NKJV: The Lord is good, A stronghold in the day of trouble; And He knows those who trust in Him.

2026-03-09.text: But you, Lord, are a shield around me, my glory, the One who lifts my head high.

translations.ESV: But you, O LORD, are a shield about me, my glory, and the lifter of my head.
translations.NIV: But you, LORD, are a shield around me, my glory, the One who lifts my head high.
translations.NLT: But you, O Lord, are a shield around me; you are my glory, the one who holds my head high.
translations.WEB: But you, Yahweh, are a shield around me, my glory, and the one who lifts up my head.
translations.NKJV: But You, O Lord, are a shield for me, My glory and the One who lifts up my head.

2026-03-10.text: Therefore do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about itself. Each day has enough trouble of its own.

translations.ESV: Therefore do not be anxious about tomorrow, for tomorrow will be anxious for itself. Sufficient for the day is its own trouble.
translations.NIV: Therefore do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about itself. Each day has enough trouble of its own.
translations.NLT: So don't worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will bring its own worries. Today's trouble is enough for today.
translations.WEB: Therefore don't be anxious for tomorrow, for tomorrow will be anxious for itself. Each day's own evil is sufficient.
translations.NKJV: Therefore do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about its own things. Sufficient for the day is its own trouble.

2026-03-11.text: In the same way, let your light shine before others, that they may see your good deeds and glorify your Father in heaven.

translations.ESV: In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father who is in heaven.
translations.NIV: In the same way, let your light shine before others, that they may see your good deeds and glorify your Father in heaven.
translations.NLT: In the same way, let your good deeds shine out for all to see, so that everyone will praise your heavenly Father.
translations.WEB: Even so, let your light shine before men; that they may see your good works, and glorify your Father who is in heaven.
translations.NKJV: Let your light so shine before men, that they may see your good works and glorify your Father in heaven.

2026-03-12.text: The Lord is my rock, my fortress and my deliverer; my God is my rock, in whom I take refuge, my shield and the horn of my salvation, my stronghold.

translations.ESV: The LORD is my rock and my fortress and my deliverer, my God, my rock, in whom I take refuge, my shield, and the horn of my salvation, my stronghold.
translations.NIV: The LORD is my rock, my fortress and my deliverer; my God is my rock, in whom I take refuge, my shield and the horn of my salvation, my stronghold.
translations.NLT: The Lord is my rock, my fortress, and my savior; my God is my rock, in whom I find protection. He is my shield, the power that saves me, and my place of safety.
translations.WEB: Yahweh is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my rock, in whom I take refuge; my shield, and the horn of my salvation, my high tower.
translations.NKJV: The LORD is my rock and my fortress and my deliverer; My God, my strength, in whom I will trust; My shield and the horn of my salvation, my stronghold.

2026-03-13.text: For the Spirit God gave us does not make us timid, but gives us power, love and self-discipline.

2026-03-14.text: Wait for the Lord; be strong and take heart and wait for the Lord.

2026-03-15.text: Now faith is confidence in what we hope for and assurance about what we do not see.
